name: Solid Power, Inc.
description: Solid Power, Inc. is an industry-leading developer of all-solid-state rechargeable battery technology, primarily targeting the electric vehicle market. The company focuses on replacing the flammable liquid electrolyte used in conventional lithium-ion batteries with a proprietary sulfide-based solid electrolyte. This innovation is designed to improve safety, increase energy density, and reduce costs by utilizing existing lithium-ion manufacturing processes. Solid Power operates as both a materials provider and a technology licensor, collaborating with major automotive partners like BMW and Ford to commercialize next-generation battery cells for long-range transportation applications.
